about.mission_text: Cyna is a company specialising in cybersecurity solutions for SMBs. Our mission is to make cybersecurity accessible, effective and affordable for all organisations.

cgu.s1_content: These terms of use define the terms and conditions for using the Cyna mobile application and the services offered by Cyna.
cgu.s2_content: Use of the application implies full acceptance of these terms. Cyna reserves the right to modify these terms at any time.
cgu.s3_content: Cyna offers cybersecurity services in SaaS mode for professionals. Services are accessible via the mobile app or website.
cgu.s4_content: Subscriptions are available in different durations (monthly, annual, bi-annual). Payment is made at subscription. No refunds unless otherwise stated.
cgu.s5_content: Cyna is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with GDPR. For data requests, contact us at dpo@cyna-it.fr.
cgu.s6_content: All application content (trademarks, logos, texts, images) is the exclusive property of Cyna and is protected by intellectual property law.

legal.editor_rcs: RCS Paris B XXX XXX XXX
legal.data_text: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct and delete your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at: dpo@cyna-it.fr
legal.cookies_text: The application uses technical cookies necessary for its operation. No data is shared with third parties for commercial purposes.
legal.ip_text: All application content is protected by intellectual property rights. Reproduction without permission is prohibited.

menu.logout_message: Are you sure you want to sign out?

chat.welcome: Hello 👋 I'm the CYNA assistant. Ask me anything about our products, pricing, orders or your account!
chat.bot_greeting: Hello! I'm the CYNA assistant. I can help you with our products, pricing, orders or your account. What would you like to know?
chat.bot_pricing: Our prices start at €8.99/month (EDR Basic). Some enterprise services are available on request. Check the Catalogue to compare all our offers.
chat.bot_soc: Our SOC provides 24/7 monitoring with dedicated analysts. P1/P2 incidents are handled within 4 hours with monthly reporting included.
chat.bot_edr: CYNA EDR detects and blocks threats on your endpoints in real time. It includes automated remediation, threat hunting and SIEM integration.
chat.bot_xdr: Our XDR unifies detection across endpoints, network and cloud. It correlates multi-source events for complete visibility and orchestrated response.
chat.bot_quote: For a custom Enterprise offer, click 'Request a quote' on the product page or contact us via Support. Our team responds within 24 hours.
chat.bot_orders: Your orders are accessible in My account → Orders. You'll find the status, total and details of each past order.
chat.bot_invoices: Your invoices are available in My account → Invoices. They are automatically generated after each successful payment.
chat.bot_payment: We accept credit card payments (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) via Stripe, encrypted and secure. Your data is never stored with us.
chat.bot_password: To reset your password, use 'Forgot password?' on the sign in screen. To create an account, tap 'Sign up'.
chat.bot_2fa: Two-factor authentication can be enabled in My account → Security. It protects your account with a TOTP code (Google Authenticator, Authy…).
chat.bot_support: Go to the Support tab to send us a message. Our team typically responds within 24 business hours.
chat.bot_demo: Want a demo? Contact us via the Support form mentioning your interest. Our sales team will schedule a demo for you.
chat.bot_cancel: To cancel a subscription, go to My account → Subscriptions. You can manage your active subscriptions at any time.
chat.bot_activation: Our SaaS services are activated immediately after payment confirmation. You'll receive a confirmation email with access details.
chat.bot_fallback: I'm not sure I understand. Could you rephrase? You can also contact our team via the support form for personalised help.
